calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alex Dorman, in pro per for Appellant, AKD and Associates
Richard Idell, Esq. for Respondent, Idell & Seitel,LLP

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Alex Dorman testifies on behalf of AKD Associates, Defendant/Appellant.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
A) Idell & Seitel billing statements dated 1/26-3/16
B) Idell & Seitel billing statements dated 2/25-2/22
C) AKD agreement statement
D) AKD working folder

Richard Idell testifies on behalf of Idell & Seitel,LLP
1)Executed Retainer Agreement
2)Invoices/Bills
3)Correspondence enclosing retainer
4)Email/Correspondence re: advertising/marketing
5) Email enclosing first draft of liquor agreement
6) Email from Dorman re: receipt of first draft
7) Email chain requesting meeting to review agreement
8) Email from Idell re: vodka related article
9) Email from Dorman re status of liquor agreement
10) Email enclosing further draft and redline of liquor agreement
11) Email from Idell regarding status of vodka negotiations
12) Correspondence from Idell re refusal to remit payment and enclosing Notice of Client's Right to Arbitrate.
13) Correspondence from Idell re intentions to file suit for atty fees.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
The Court retains the exhibits.
Judge: J. Stewart; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not reported

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Set For Trial On Feb-24-10 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Judgment Entered
